prompt:
Analyze the following text and extract ALL temporal information.

For each date or time reference found, provide:
- The date string (in YYYY-MM-DD format when possible)
- A Unix timestamp (seconds since epoch) if the date is specific enough
- A brief context describing what the date refers to

For intervals (e.g. "from 2016 to 2019", "between March and June"), provide:
- start and end timestamps
- context

Also determine the overall time span of the text:
- start_ts: earliest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)
- end_ts: latest date mentioned (as Unix timestamp)

Text:
"""[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] John said: "Hey Maria, great to chat again! I joined a service-focused online group last week and it's been an emotional ride. Everyone there is incredible with their own inspiring stories. They've opened my eyes to new perspectives, and I'm feeling a sense of connection and purpose with them."
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] Maria said: "Wow, John! That's amazing news. It's great to see you finding such a supportive community that is making a difference."
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] John said: "Thanks, Maria! It's great to have a group of people with the same passion for serving. It's been really inspiring sharing stories, advice, and encouragement."
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] Maria said: "That's great to hear! It's always inspiring to share thos things with like-minded individuals. By the way, have you had the chance to meet any of them in person?
"
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] John said: "We held some events and got to meet some people. We went to a homeless shelter to give out food and supplies. Seeing the smiles on their faces, we knew we made a real difference. We also organized a toy drive for kids in need. It was amazing seeing the community come together to spread some joy."
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] Maria said: "That sounds great, John. It's nice to see the difference you're making. Do you have any ideas for future projects?"
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] John said: "We're brainstorming some to help underserved communities get access to education, mentorship, job training, and resume building. The goal is to empower individuals in achieving their aspirations."
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] Maria said: "That's great, John! Empowering individuals through education and mentorship is crucial for helping them reach their goals. Can't wait to see the initiatives you come up with!"
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] John said: "Thanks, Maria! I'm really excited about them too. I believe that providing the right assistance and resources can make a lasting impact."
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] Maria said: "Yep John, a bit of support can make an amazing change. You're spot on about it, it really is powerful. Keep doing what you're doing, it's really inspiring!"
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] John said: "Thanks, Maria! I really appreciate your support, It means a lot to me. Especially after I failed the military aptitude test recently, I've been feeling a bit stressed out."
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] Maria said: "No worries, John. I'm here for you and I got your back. Nature's beauty reminds me to slow down and enjoy the small stuff."
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] John said: "That's a chill pic! Where did you find it?"
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] Maria said: "I took it at the beach last month. Watching the sunset was so peaceful, it made me feel connected to nature and appreciate life's small moments."
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] John said: "Wow, nature can be so beautiful! It reminds me of the film camera I had as a kid, I took plenty of beach pics. Thanks for sharing."
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] Maria said: "Glad you enjoyed it, John! It's amazing how beautiful it can be."
[8:30 pm on 1 January, 2023] John said: "Yeah, it does. It helps us remember the small joys, especially when life gets busy.""""

Return JSON:
```json
{{
    "dates": [
        {{
            "date_str": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "timestamp": <unix timestamp as float or null>,
            "context": "brief description of what this date refers to"
        }}
    ],
    "intervals": [
        {{
            "start_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "end_date": "YYYY-MM-DD",
            "start_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "end_ts": <unix timestamp as float>,
            "context": "brief description"
        }}
    ],
    "start_ts": <earliest unix timestamp or null>,
    "end_ts": <latest unix timestamp or null>
}}
```

If no temporal information is found, return empty lists and null timestamps.

JSON Output: /no_think
